candidates.text: I don’t usually do this, but I’m asking for prayers for our girl. She was admitted to Levine Children’s Hospital last night. She had an episode yesterday morning where she was violently shaking. I took her to the pediatrician and they suspected seizure activity. They told me if anything else happened to take her to the hospital, with it being a weekend. Yesterday afternoon, she got down out of my lap, and I thought she was going to play. She sat down and quit breathing, turned purple and went...
